name: Chocolate-Glazed Banana Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease two 9-inch cake pans or one 13-by-9-by-2-inch baking pan with shortening. Flour and set aside.
3. Sift flour and baking powder; set aside.
4. In a mixer bowl, beat sugar with eggs and butter on medium speed for 5 minutes, scraping the bowl down several times. Reduce speed to low, then beat in bananas and buttermilk. Add dry ingredients all at once, mixing only to moisten the dry ingredients.
5. Spoon batter into pans and bake on the middle shelf of the oven for 25-30 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Cool for 5 minutes in pans, then turn onto a rack to finish cooling. For best results, wrap cooled layers in film and ripen overnight before serving.
7. Either serve plain or with Chocolate Glaze.
1. Sift powdered sugar and cocoa; set aside.
2. Melt chocolate over simmering water in a double boiler, or in the microwave oven on high for 1 minute.
3. Off heat, stir boiling water into melted chocolate to make a smooth paste, then stir in the sugar-cocoa mixture.
4. Spread evenly while warm over Banana Cake layers.
